message: Jake
Yuriko
Gabriela
Kristy
Günter
Phew
What a day it is today.
From this morning,
I was called and asked a weird question, and then stopped by some strange guy.
Hah,
I ended up completely worn out.
Thud, thud, thud.
Hah,
Why is every morning such a lively commute?
Bang!!
Huff, huff.
I look normal despite breathing heavily.
That's just how it is.
But,
today was a more intense commute than usual.
Hehe.
I was glued to the TV this morning.
Boss, you look tired.
Is something wrong?
Yeah.
Well, it’s the kind of story I was expecting,
but did you come to mock me for not having detective skills?!
Murmur.
Not at all.
Then what is it?
Just had my work canceled.
Canceled work!? That's worse than being mocked, boss!
That's terrible,
Whoa whoa whoa
I just blurted out my true feelings!
Just kidding, haha.
I'm sorry, Boss!
Welcome back, Boss.

Hey, Boss.
You look exhausted this morning, showing signs of low energy all around.
Yeah, I really feel that way.
What happened to you?
Since this morning,
I met someone and was made to feel quite uneasy.
It's not like teachers to do that. It must have been the Boss's fault.
So, what happened to put such a dark expression on your face?
Boss, what exactly happened?
Ugh.
Well, you see,
it's just.
No, never mind,
I’ll just drop it.
Huh?
W-why not?!
It's not really something I can share.
Ugh.
Whatever, it’s not like I care!
So, what should I do today?
I'm busy right now. Please don't talk to me.
Oh right, Boss,
I almost forgot to mention, you probably aren’t aware, are you?
What’s that about?
Apparently, Eva Courtney's ears have been delivered to Baked Apple Inc.
Ears? Is it some kind of joke item?
Seems like they’re the real deal. Her whereabouts are reportedly unknown.
Where did you get that info?
It was reported in the newspaper and on TV. You should pay more attention to the world around you, Boss.
At this rate, if I disappear, it's a sure thing that Boss will be left behind in this world.
I'm busy right now, please don't talk to me.
Speaking of Meryl, is Cindy still not okay?
U
Hmm, Tim's audition isn't over yet, you know. They won't make a decision until that's done.
I see, so that means it's still not okay.
As long as Meryl isn't mad, that's fine.
She'll get mad, that's for sure.
Boss,
did something happen to you? Why won’t you talk to me about anything?
I'm busy right now, please don't talk to me.
Sorry, but could you give me more details?
No. Boss didn't tell me anything, so I won’t tell you either.
Huh?
Well, that's not really something to talk about.
Um, how should I put it?
Well,
I get it, I really do.
Something's been said about you, hasn't it?
I understand. But, I can't help feeling a little sad, like I was left out.
I didn't mean it like that, sorry.
I just wanted to tease the Boss a little bit. I'm sorry.
Well, back to the usual.
San.
Here we go!
It's not just the Boss who hopes that San gets better soon.
Well, that’s definitely recovered now.
Is that so?
It’s okay, I felt it while talking. I’ve completely moved on from Guy too.
If that’s true, then I’m glad for you. We should celebrate.
But still,
aren’t you not fully recovered until the doctor gives the okay?
You're such a worrywart.
It's okay, really.
Is that so?
I hope it heals like this.
Any word from Guy?
Not at all. But thinking back, he never really contacted us that often anyway.
Yeah.
But still, we should at least know where he is.
That was a tough situation.
At this point, we might have to think he’s in a position where he can't contact us.
Oh, but he might be missing.
If a birth parent suddenly shows up, would it be normal for them to harbor resentment?
Well, that might depend on their circumstances at the time, right? I think for Cindy, who lost her parents, it could be a happy thing.
What’s important is that Cindy gets to meet Meryl.
So, he's a top-notch psychiatrist, right?
Yeah, that's why he has a good reputation.
Uh-huh.
Yeah, that’s true.
What really happened?
His assessment said,
it's severe, but to me, it looks like he's already completely healed.
Boss, it's better to leave that to the experts.
But he might just be trying to squeeze counseling fees from perfectly healthy people!
Isn’t that what therapists do? The point is to make the patients feel secure.
Doesn’t that sound a bit sketchy?
Really? A monthly income of $12,000 doesn't sound attractive?
Sorry about that.
I don't even have half of that.
It's understandable for him to be angry.
But I really didn’t want him to cancel.
He didn't cancel just because he was mad at us.
Really? Then what was the reason?
Somehow she seems to be afraid that the issue with Ginny will become a police matter and realizes there's a connection to Eva's case.
W-wait a minute! Th-that means...
You think it's fine no matter what happens to Ginny?
L-let's think calmly about this. Up until now,
there's been no threatening calls or statements from the culprit at all.
Well, that's only natural, isn't it? They would be in trouble if they got caught.
It's no good because the boss is dawdling.
That's not the point, right? If it's a crime born of vengeance, shouldn't they show some sort of reaction?
Now that you mention it, I suppose that makes sense. But just because of that, we can’t say it’s the same person behind the Serial Murder Case.
Yeah, it could be that the Serial Murder Case is unrelated.
But what does the police think?
It seems similar, so they might think it's the work of the same perpetrator, after all.
If that happens, they'll investigate various things, right? That's what we want to avoid.
You see.
Uh.
So, are they hiding something?
There's been no progress with the request at all. At this rate, they'll get mad and cancel.
Because there's nothing to investigate.
D-don’t say stupid things! This is work, so please do your best!
I’m begging you, just be a serious detective.
I thought of something while the boss was away.
Yeah? What is it?
I really think the key is on Columbus Street.
Uh.
Yeah.
But if I'm not careful, that could lead directly to the Serial Murder Case.
That’s true.
Do you think Eva is still alive?
I have no idea about that.
Lately, various things have been happening around me. It's kind of unpleasant, you know?
Yeah.
There have been a lot of tough things, after all.
No, that’s not it.
Is it called a detective spirit? Whenever something happens, I get all excited.
Oh.
Aaaaah, what an insensitive woman I am.
How was Baked Apple Inc.?
No, it was quite calm.
Huh?
Isn't that kind of strange?”
Andy was in a daze, and everyone else was out.
Can you really call that calm?
But Eva seemed to be investigating something on Columbus Street.
Columbus Street? You don’t mean she was busy shopping, do you?
That’s what I think.
So, is she saying that to get to the bottom of the ear incident, we need to look into Columbus Street?
Could it be that the culprit lives on Columbus Street?
About Eva's case, could it possibly be related to the serial murder case?
Yeah, that's what I thought too.
When she came here, she spoke as if she knew the culprit, right?
That’s true.
So, the culprit might be Tony or Jennifer.
Wait a second.
Why do you insist it's Tony or Jennifer?
Well, it’s Jennifer, who’s rumored to be the culprit of the serial murder case, and Tony, who’s the most suspicious right now. There’s a possibility.
Isn't that a bit too simplistic?
It’s fine, I'm not yet at the level of a great detective.
The incident started with a delivery that arrived for BAM's editorial department. I wondered what it was and opened it.
And inside were two ears. But how do we know they belong to Eva?
They said on TV that the earrings were the same as the ones she had.
It seemed like she was grasping something.
Are they saying she was killed to keep her quiet?
That might be a possibility, right?
No way.
Hey, Boss.
Do you think Eva is the work of a serial killer?
I can’t say for sure, but considering her behavior, I think it's a reasonable guess.
That’s what I thought.
So, that means the culprit is still in this town, right?
Looks like that might be the case. No, maybe that event.
was just pretending.
Ugh.
Mm.
Oh! Does that mean Ginny could be...
No way are you saying she might have been killed by the serial murderer?
Because, you know, you can't help but connect the dots here — cutting off the left hand and all!
It’s also possible to think of it as a so-called joy killer.
But the chance of it being a joy killer is pretty low, I bet.
First, I want to somehow.
get on her good side and hear more details about Eva.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
